activities.details: The crest of the Fitzharmon family was scattered all over Gielinor! Its recovery means Dimintheis's estate is safe.
The crest of the Fitzharmon family was scattered all over Gielinor! Its recovery means Dimintheis's estate is safe.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 68.
I levelled my Defence skill, I am now level 67.
After defeating Flesh-hatcher Mhekarnahz, I looted a Stalker's Charm.
A mysterious stranger called Lucien hired me to steal the Staff of Armadyl from the Temple of Ikov. I had no idea it was a god weapon!
Completing Creature of Fenkenstrain has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 70 QP milestone.
It was a dark errand indeed, but the corpse has been reanimated and I've 'persuaded' Fenkenstrain to part with the Ring of Charos!
I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 28.
I now have a total level of 1400, split among all my skills.
I'm now a qualified archaeologist, having learned from the best at Varrock Dig Site and found a mysterious cavern with strange symbols.
I levelled my Necromancy skill, I am now level 67.
I levelled my Defence skill, I am now level 66.
I levelled my Constitution skill, I am now level 67.
